extName.message: Flobro - Always on Top Floating Window
extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome and the Web Store listing title.

extDesc.message: Keep any tab always on top in a floating window. Pin videos, docs or dashboards in a chromeless popup, or float above every app.
extDesc.description: Extension short description / Web Store listing summary. Max 132 chars.

floatHereSub.message: Minimal window, no tabs or address bar

getAppNote.message: The free desktop app keeps windows on top of everything.

optMove.message: Move the current tab into the floating window

optMoveSub.message: Keeps video playback running. Unchecked: opens a fresh copy instead.

optUsageSub.message: Only hostnames of floated pages (like youtube.com). Never full URLs, never your IP.

optResetDone.message: Detection reset. The popup will ask again next time.

optNote.message: This extension keeps windows minimal, but only the Flobro desktop app can keep them always on top. It is the modern successor of the original Flobro Chrome App.

optNoteLink.message: Get the free Flobro desktop app

ctxUnfloat.message: Move back to the main window
